title: Building Big with Jerm
description: This pack aims to enhance the vanilla Minecraft building experience in both Creative and Survival.
body:
**Building Big w/ Jerm**

This pack is the pack I used in my Survival Singleplayer Minecraft series on my Youtube Channel.

**Main Features Included**

Axiom is one of the best building mods that has ever released and it is an essential mod for me when doing any creative building.

Litematica is used for bringing the builds planned in creative into my Survival world.

For visuals, I've also installed mods like Better Clouds, Polytone, Particle Rain, and more to improve the ambience in the game.

Sodium, Iris, and many other performance mods have been added to keep the performance as smooth as possible with all the extra detail mods that I've added.
